title: See task-level progress in task bar
story: As a developer running a build workflow, I want to see individual tasks checking off in the task bar so that I can track progress without reading file diffs.
acceptance_criteria: TaskCreate entry created for each main task (not sub-tasks)
Completed tasks show strikethrough in the task bar
Task entries persist through the full phase (not deleted after tier)

title: See stable-order phase summary
story: As a developer completing a phase, I want to see a formatted summary of all tasks in their original order so that I get a clear picture of what was done.
acceptance_criteria: Summary prints at phase boundary with tasks in stable order
Tasks grouped by category with status icons and progress counts
Task entries cleaned up from task bar after summary prints

title: Upstream stable ordering request
story: As the iSDLC maintainer, I want to file a feature request for stable task ordering so that future versions can display tasks in their original order.
acceptance_criteria: Issue describes the stable ordering / position parameter need
